creator: bmah@ca.sandia.gov
text:
Enclosed is a patch to fix several problems in the vnc-3.3.2r2 port, for
which I'm the listed maintainer:

1.  Port will now use the ${PERL} variable in bsd.port.mk to locate the
perl interpreter.  Currently it's hard-coded, which will probably break on
3.0-RELEASE.

2.  Applied a bugfix for a memory leak in Xvnc.

3.  Updated pkg/PLIST to track a stealth upgrade in documentation files.

4.  Workaround for a perl5 bug, described in PR ports/8053.

Fix: Patch follows, uuencode-d:
